parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Browser view selector. For OKF spaces, files lists original files under sources/raw; okf_bundle lists generated bundle files under okf; outputs lists generated output files under output.

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: Drive node id of a folder inside the selected browser view root. Omit it to resolve the current view root; the resolved folder id is returned as data.parentId.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of browser nodes to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 200.

get.description: Lists one cursor page from a bounded knowledge browser view. For OKF knowledge spaces, view=files resolves to the original raw source file root sources/raw and must not expose the generated okf/ bundle directory tree. view=okf_bundle resolves to the generated OKF bundle root okf, and view=outputs resolves to output. When parentId is omitted, the response data.parentId is the resolved Drive folder for the current view root; clients must use it for root uploads and root folder creation. When parentId is provided, it must stay inside the selected view root.

OkfConceptSummaryList.description: One bounded cursor page of published OKF concept summaries.

KnowledgeOkfConceptRevisionList.description: One bounded cursor page of OKF concept revisions.

KnowledgeBrowserView.description: Browser view selector. files lists original source files; for OKF spaces this is sources/raw. okf_bundle lists generated OKF bundle files under okf. outputs lists generated output files under output.

parentId.description: Drive folder id within the selected browser view root. For OKF files view, it must be under sources/raw; for okf_bundle, under okf; for outputs, under output.

view.description: files shows original files, okf_bundle shows generated OKF bundle content, outputs shows generated outputs.

pageSize.description: JSON request body page size. HTTP GET uses page_size on the wire.

ListKnowledgeBrowserRequest.description: Browser list request. parentId is a Drive folder id within the selected view root; omit parentId to resolve the view root.

KnowledgeAgentKnowledgeMode.description: Knowledge execution mode. okf_bundle uses native OKF bundle knowledge, rag uses native RAG retrieval, and external delegates to an external knowledge engine integration.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.

KnowledgeBrowserListData.description: Standard browser list response data. It follows SDKWork list semantics with items and pageInfo, and also returns the resolved Drive view context needed by clients.

driveSpaceId.description: Drive space id bound to the knowledge space.

parentId.description: Resolved Drive folder id for the current browser view page. When request parentId is omitted, this is the view root folder id; OKF files view resolves to sources/raw.
